text:
(In reply to Yuri Victorovich from comment #3)

I was not trying to claim that your way of building
as non-standard compared to upstream. (I've no
knowledge of upstream.)

It just also produces STATIC_TLS and use of
R_X86_64_TPOFF64 , which looks to be inappropriate
for a .so .
